from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *

try:

    storage_account = "sadevenvdatamart"
    container = "adlsgen2"

    bronze_path = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/staging/OnPremSQLServer/parquet/bookings_raw.parquet"

    df = spark.read.parquet(bronze_path)

    # Paths
    silver_path = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/preintegration/booking"
    bronze_error_path = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze_error/booking"

    # Regex patterns
    date_regex = r'^(\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{4}|\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{2}|\d{2} \w{3} \d{2}|\d{4}/\d{2}/\d{2})$'
    amount_regex = r'^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'

    # Clean fare_amount
    df = df.withColumn(
        "fare_amount_clean",
        regexp_replace(col("fare_amount"), "[^0-9.]", "")
    )

    # Apply Data Quality checks
    df_with_error = df.withColumn(
        "error_reason",

        when(col("booking_id").isNull() | (trim(col("booking_id")) == "") | (lower(col("booking_id")) == "null"),
             "Invalid booking_id")

        .when(col("passenger_id").isNull() | (trim(col("passenger_id")) == "") | (lower(col("passenger_id")) == "null"),
             "Invalid passenger_id")

        .when(~col("fare_amount_clean").rlike(amount_regex),
             "Invalid fare_amount format")

        .when(col("fare_amount_clean").cast("double") < 0,
             "fare_amount less than 0")

        .when(~col("booking_date").rlike(date_regex),
             "Invalid booking_date format")
    )

    # Valid records
    df_valid = df_with_error.filter(col("error_reason").isNull()) \
                            .drop("error_reason") \
                            .withColumn("fare_amount", col("fare_amount_clean").cast("double")) \
                            .drop("fare_amount_clean") \
                            .withColumn("load_date", current_timestamp())

    # Invalid records
    df_invalid = df_with_error.filter(col("error_reason").isNotNull()) \
                              .withColumn("load_date", current_timestamp())

    # Debug counts
    print("Total records:", df.count())
    print("Valid records:", df_valid.count())
    print("Invalid records:", df_invalid.count())

    # Reduce partitions for stability
    df_valid = df_valid.repartition(1)
    df_invalid = df_invalid.repartition(1)

    # Write Valid → Silver
    df_valid.write \
        .mode("overwrite") \
        .format("parquet") \
        .save(silver_path)

    # Write Invalid → Bronze Error
    df_invalid.write \
        .mode("overwrite") \
        .format("parquet") \
        .save(bronze_error_path)

    print("Booking Pre-Integration completed successfully")

    mssparkutils.notebook.exit("SUCCESS")

except Exception as e:

    print("Notebook Failed:", str(e))

    mssparkutils.notebook.exit("FAILED: " + str(e))
